character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Participates in analyzing a treasure map and planning a voyage. Interacts with the squire and Jim.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Expresses eagerness for treasure, plans to outfit a ship, and is hot-headed.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Agreeable to the plan, involved in the treasure search, and observed map details.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Designated as cabin-boy, part of the group planning the voyage.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Oversees Jim at the hall, involved in preparations for the voyage.

character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Hired as ship’s cook, lost a leg, and has a history of service.
